englishDefinitions: A famous desert region in the southwestern United States, known for its sandstone formations.
A culturally significant landscape often associated with Native American heritage and western films.
persianTranslation: منطقه مشهور صخره‌ای در جنوب‌غرب آمریکا
examples: We visited Monument Valley on our road trip.
Monument Valley is famous for its dramatic desert scenery.
Many western films were shot in Monument Valley.
